question.exact_question: Under CompletionClass v1's whole_family primitive (conclusion class global/ontological), including v1's closure under declared product and sequential composition and its frozen-comparison contract, is admitting the target superconducting phase into the fixed completion family a legitimate whole_family completion of the frozen witness P2C-W1 -- or does legitimacy require an admissibility restriction without which every physically realized phase is absorbable by fiat (the fixed-family-absorber / F1 question)?

verdict.label: LEGITIMATE_BUT_CONCLUSION_CAPPED
verdict.one_line: Admitting the S phase is a LEGITIMATE whole_family completion of P2C-W1 earning GLOBAL_ONTOLOGICAL_ABSORPTION only; legitimacy DOES require an admissibility restriction against fiat-absorption, and CompletionClass v1 ALREADY carries it as the conclusion-class firewall; the operational/capability residue is NOT absorbed by this move. The F1 dichotomy is false under v1: it is both a legitimate completion and already restriction-governed.

scope: Resolves ONLY the legitimacy and conclusion strength of the whole_family primitive for P2C-W1, at exploration tier, formal-only grade; absorbed under RUN-0081 gate clause 4. NOT a SURVIVES_BOUNDED_COMPLETION_CLASS return (only one of eleven primitives at issue; a full survival requires all eleven with verified nonfactorization certificates under declared composition closure). Establishes no physical source issuance; asserts no capability change (time-as-finality's question); moves no TI claim.
findings: F-1 (checks e1, s1): admitting the S phase is a legitimate whole_family completion because v1 maps whole_family to the global/ontological class and a global witness need not be predictive; physical admissibility is scientific input, discharged for this witness at literature grade (one BCS/Ginzburg-Landau Hamiltonian, one phase diagram whose two regions are N and S), so the admission is not classifier fiat. It legitimately blocks an absolute semantic/metaphysical novelty claim.

F-2 (checks e2, e2-fail, s2): the admissibility restriction P2C asks about already exists in v1 as the conclusion-class firewall -- v1 forbids upgrading a global/ontological absorption into a physical/predictive or operational/context one, and states outright that treating unrestricted global completions as ordinary physical explanations 'would make the positive class empty by definition.' The fixture makes the restriction load-bearing: removing the cap operationally absorbs even the null phase (fiat collapse), emptying the operational positive class; the capped scorer keeps it non-empty.

F-3 (checks e3, e3-fail, e4, e4-fail): the witness's operational/capability residue (realize the task from the N frame at matched budget) is an operational/context-class claim that the global absorption does not touch; no operational or physical witness (resource, access, boundary, seed, hidden-state) reproduces the (Q,I,P)+persistence signature from N (TI's mirror of P2C's k1), and a class-blind merge that read an operational verdict off the global witness would wrongly report the capability absorbed.

verification_of_input_bundle.discriminator_rerun: exit 0; stdout byte-identical to the frozen discriminator_output.txt (7 [E] + 4 [F] = 11, 2 [T])

method_ledger.label: CompletionClass v1 conclusion-class adjudication fixture
method_ledger.grade: computation (deterministic, stdlib-only Python 3; output frozen and hashed); absorbed under RUN-0081 gate clause 4
method_ledger.result: 5 [E] + 5 [F] = 10 evidential checks + 2 [T] by-construction; every [F] flips a protected [E] on a shared code path; exit 0. Establishes: e1 whole_family_with_phase reproduces the (Q,I,P) signature; e2 that absorption licenses ONLY global/ontological; e2-fail removing the cap empties the operational positive class; e3 no operational/physical witness reproduces the signature from N; e4 the capability claim is left unadjudicated by the global absorption.
method_ledger.verification: Re-run blobs/ti_wfa_01_fixture.py; normalize CR and byte-compare stdout against blobs/ti_wfa_01_output.txt (exit 0 requires all five [F] probes to fail).

premises: A1 (definition): CompletionClass v1 as frozen in blobs/COMPLETION-CLASS.md -- the eleven-primitive inventory, the primitive->conclusion-class map, the four non-interchangeable conclusion strengths, the admissibility rules, and the frozen-comparison contract.
A2 (definition): TI's RUN-0081 OnlineIssuance^LC gate, clause 4 (finite/computable/fixed-law => absorbed), under which the fixture itself is absorbed and carries no source-issuance weight.

A3 (scientific_input): the physical admissibility of the whole_family completion for THIS witness -- that the N and S phases are two regions of one fixed BCS/Ginzburg-Landau Hamiltonian's phase diagram -- is cited at P2C's literature grade, read-only; TI does not re-derive physics.

A4 (construction_choice): the finite deterministic model of v1's conclusion-class bookkeeping in blobs/ti_wfa_01_fixture.py, mirroring P2C-W1's (Q,I,P) signature and P2C's k1/k2/k2-fail structure without importing P2C's hierarchy vocabulary or grades.
nonclaims: No physical or source-issuance significance: the fixture is absorbed under RUN-0081 gate clause 4 and must not be cited as evidence for Issue[S] of any type; Issue[S]^physical remains false.
No TI claim status changes: TI-C019 (formalizing) and TI-C020 (parked) are untouched; E177 is unmodified; no claim is promoted or demoted.
No capability verdict: whether the operational/capability residue is an actual capability change is time-as-finality's question; TI neither asserts nor denies it.

No import of P2C's hierarchy, grades, or falsifier bookkeeping; TI answers only in its own CompletionClass v1 formalism. Whether this discharges P2C's F1 is P2C's sovereign call (authority_transfer = false).
This is not a SURVIVES_BOUNDED_COMPLETION_CLASS return; only the whole_family primitive was adjudicated.
The designed fixture models v1's contract behavior, not real superconductors; the physics of P2C-W1 is cited at literature grade, not re-run.
residuals: R-1: Whether a claimed 'fixed family' legitimately pre-contains a signature is domain-specific scientific input v1's classifier cannot decide in general (v1 'Honest limits'); discharged here at literature grade for the superconducting-ring phase diagram only.

R-2: The general F1 trivialization worry ('does admitting any realized phase empty the capability level?') is not answered by family-exhaustiveness but is dissolved by the conclusion-class cap; a family-exhaustiveness certificate remains an open v1 proof obligation in the general case.
R-3: Only the whole_family primitive was scored; a full completion tournament over all eleven primitives with nonfactorization certificates was not run (not requested).
